sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 99:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 99:1
items.html: Since they are extended from the phase of the looking of the Einayim in AHP, which are YHV without the bottom Hey, and the bottom Hey remains concealed in the Einayim. (Inner Observation, Item 9)
